name: Currant Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 450F (Gas Mark 8) for 15 minutes, then reduce to 375F (Gas Mark 5).
2. Soak the dried fruit and candied peel in warm water mixed with the spice until steeped.
3. Strain the liquid into a bowl and mix the flour and salt together.
4. Rub in the lard; beat the yeast with sugar and some of the spiced water, then add to the flour mixture along with the eggs.
5. Mix in enough warm water to create a firm yet elastic dough.
6. Knead well, cover, and let rise for 1 hour.
7. Knock back the dough and mix in the drained fruit.
8. Shape into loaves and place in greased tins in a warm area to prove until doubled in size.
9. Bake at 450F (Gas Mark 8) for 15 minutes, then reduce to 375F (Gas Mark 5) and bake for an additional 45 minutes.
